--- Menu Page: https://www.thepoboyshopatl.com/menu ---
Menu | The Po'Boy Shop
top of page
Order Online
Breakfast
Lunch & Dinner
Large Group Menu
Po'Boys
All po'boys traditionally dressed with lettuce, tomato, mayo, and pickle
TRY ONE OVERSTUFFED:
protein & price of a regular served on a small roll
MAKE IT A COMBO:
add a small side of fries to your po'boy for $1.99
Shrimp:
fried, blackened, or grilled with large shrimp & spicy remoulade
Popcorn Shrimp:
overflowing with medium shrimp and spicy remoulade
Oyster:
with spicy remoulade
Half & Half:
fried shrimp & fried oysters with spicy remoulade
Crawfish:
with spicy remoulade
Fried Catfish:
with spicy remoulade
Blackened Grouper:
grilled grouper with spicy remoulade *fried upon request
Surf & Turf:
shrimp topped with debris, gravy & spicy remoulade and horseradish
Crystal'd Shrimp:
fried shrimp toasted in our Crystal wing sauce with bleu cheese or ranch
Alligator:
fried gator chunks with spicy remoulade
Debris:
slow-roasted beef soaked in gravy with horseradish sauce - it's messy!
Fried Chicken:
with honey mustard
*blackened or grilled upon request
Crystal'd Chicken:
fried chicken tossed in our Crystal wing sauce with bleu cheese or ranch
Muffuletta:
capicola, mortadella, salami, ham, mozzarella, provolone, topped with our shop-made olive salad - served warm *cold on request
The Ferdi:
debris, ham, American cheese, soaked in gravy with horseradish sauce
French Fry & Gravy:
"The Original Po'Boy" regular sized only *add cheese $1
Andouille Sausage:
grilled onions with creole mustard
Cheeseburger:
ground blend of brisket/short rib/chuck, with American cheese, grilled onions
PATTON'S Hot Sausage:
with American cheese and grilled onions
DESSERT:
Bourbon-glazed bread pudding - CRAZY GOOD!
Ham & Cheese:
hot or cold with American cheese
Vegetarian Mushroom:
lightly fried oyster mushroom with remoulade *grilled on request
bottom of page
